g.title: Contains: Norhtbound Ingest Service, NATS Telemetry Stream, Bytewax Streaming Engine, NATS Command Queue, pgVector Local DB, Redis Hot Cache, Southbound Write Driver, Nginx Gateway, LangGraph Agent, TimescaleDB, Semantic Gatekeeper, Grafana Dashboard, and Prometheus System Monitor.

text.tspan: Responsible for monitoring live telemetry, reviewing AI-generated intents and
reasoning traces, and physically verifying field conditions. Acts as the primary
dual-auth signer to approve AI-proposed failover intents via the Secure
Dashboard. Observes system-enforced safety delays and pessimistic
Manages the hardcoded Forbidden Register List, performs statistical alarm
rationalization and reviews audit logs. Acts as the secondary dual-auth signer
for high-impact AI failovers and is responsible for making sure the AI
Oversees overall plant performance, KPIs (OEE), incident response governance,
and safety metrics. Audits WORM execution logs and providesn secondary
dual-auth approval for critical overrides. Holds the final sign-off authority
to transition the AI from Passive Monitor to Active Control.

g.text: Cognitive Reliability and Predictive Failover Middleware for Industrial Control Processes running an asynchronous CQRS data pipeline within the IDMZ.
Central corporate management system tracking fleet logistics, big-data summaries, and transactional metrics.
Existing SCADA, MES, and Operational Historians providing the foundational Operational Truth.
Physical process components, I/O modules, and field actuators modulating real-world kinetics.
Independent safety system with hardwired logic, enforcing critical safety functions and emergency shutdowns.
